title: Air cleaner element removal and inspection

blocks.text: Air cleaner element removal and inspection
Remove the purge tube from the clamp (A). Remove the check valve (B) from the joint rubber. Remove the air cleaner cover (C). Remove the air cleaner element (D).
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items: Do not engage the seal rubber of the air cleaner element during installation.
After completing the work, make sure the check valve is secured in the joint rubber.
If the idling continues to be unstable Check idling RPM (2) The following is a list of the items that shall be performed.

blocks.text: Replace the air cleaner element if it is noticeably dirty or damaged.

items: Do not clean by air blow.
